transcript.text:
Jeongwon Bunsik's lifetime free food certificate Including your direct families
This will no longer be valid once the restaurant closes down
You sure?
6 different kinds of Jeongwon Bunski dishes
You do eat very fast
(I'm no pushover)
Don't push yourself too hard
You should stop!
(Too easy)
OMG NO WAY
Take it easy!
I'm alright so far
[Trust me, I'ma get it!]
Please watch these foods die as they may feel lonely on the way to heaven
Hello everyone~
I'm very nervous today as I'm waiting to meet a great senior of the small restaurant industry

How are you, sir!
Oh! President Park!
President Lee!
It's really great to see you! great to see you! It's great to see you! It's great to see you!
Is your name Jeongwon Park?
Now I see why it's Jeongwon Bunsik
Last name Park is very familiar with me since it's my wife's last name too
And I um...
haven't eaten anything since yesterday
Omg What?
Don't worry I got you. Bet!
But before that, I got something for you!
Thank you so much! [Tzuyang prepared it in appreciation of the gift she received last time]
This one is quite expensive
I'm fine with the food now
Thank you once again

Are you the one who came up with the design and decor of this place?
The interior is neat, fresh, and very clean
Remember you gave me the lifetime free food voucher last time?
So I got one for you too if you beat the challenge
Free food for life for Bongwon Lee Including his direct families
Are you taking it back if I fail?
Of course!
[Jjampong Tteokbokki (Spicy Seafood Rice Cake)]
[Military Tteokbokki]
Do you often enjoy tteokbokki?
Not.. really.. to be honest
Monte Cristo sandwich looks amazing tho
You like that kind of food?
Not really..
[Monte Cristo sandwich]
[Sundae bokkeum (Stir-Fried pork intestines with white sauce)]

[Yeonmacheong with rice (A bowl of rice topped with soy sauce marinated salmon, mayo, and herring roe]
Oh, please stay seated
You don't have to do all that
It's my pleasure, sir
Here's your tteokbokki first
And this one is Jjampong tteokbokki. Jjampong ttekobokkI! I'm very excited
Oh God
Oh, that's the one I was talking about
The signature dish! sandwich
A bowl of rice with yeonmacheong
How many more..?
You're trying to kill me
This is the last one! That's fishcake!
So I have to eat all this for the free food certificate?
Alright, let's start with Jjampong first
Though I love the name "Jjampong tteokbokki," I got a better name for this

Have you ever heard of a movie called "The Day a Pig Fell Into the Well."
So what about "The Day a Tteokbokki Fell into the Jjampong soup."
The seafood flavor is very rich
LMAO
You eat really fast
This is my first mukbang in life
Today's menu is Jjampong flavored tteokbokki! "The Day a Tteokbokki Fell into the Jjampong soup."
Yummy
And this is..
the signature menu in this restaurant! Count Monte Cristo
It's Monte Cristo sandwich!
Oops my bad
It has lots of ingredients inside including hams
Really tasty
Although a fried sandwich sounds a bit off, it's actually fresh and savory
I think I'm full already

Did you just say you are full already?
Oh heck no no no no I just started eating. Wym
Not even close!
Then, try the other dishes too! Try the military tteokbokki
Oh I see, you mix the cheese once it starts melting
The food disappears real fast when you are eating, but it doesn't for me
This is called "The Day a Tteokbokki Fell into the military."
This does taste like military stew
This is the fried pork intestine
Oh wow
Unlike the typical steamed pork intestine, it's very crunchy like fried dish [I mean.. It's fried..]
[Already full]
Are you going to mix it for me?
Yep. You have to mix it well because of the wasabi inside
I skipped 3 meals for this mukbang, and I'm already there
For real?

I'm just kidding. Not even close
You sure?
Of course, I haven't even started yet
What kind of bibimbap (Korean Mixed Rice) is it?
It's a mix of soy sauce marinated salmon, mayo, and herring roe
Smooth and soft
The wasabi scent makes it aromatic at the end
Excuse me, I'm sorry to interrupt
I'm a big fan of yours. May I have your autograph please?
Huh? Me? There's no way
I am serious. Since the "Sikeomons (a comedy TV program in the 80s)"
That means you are pretty old
Oh, is he the main chef here? Yes, he is
The foods are really delicious Thank you
I need to eat all of it tho
Thank you so much Thank you

Please enjoy the meal
You've tried a little bit of everything once you try the fish cake soup
I can already tell that the soup is deeper than that of other restaurants just by looking at it
It's got a lot of fish cakes in it
[Gulping down]
Are you okay?
I think you've already reached the limit
I'm going to try to the best of my ability
give me some tips on doing mukbang
You just have to enjoy the food
[What a useful tip]
Are you full?
Oh heck no, I am not full at all. Not even close
I don't want you to have an upset stomach. Please don't push yourself too hard
I came here with this great ambition
of beating the challenge

so that my son who just ETS'd from the mandatory military service can use the lifetime free food pass
and eat as much as he wants
Please stop !
Oh no, please STOP!
calm down please
I'm okay!
[Dear my son, are you watching this?...]
Please don't do it anymore
I'll just tell him to go buy his own food
Yeah I'm bout to die
I told you. I'll take care of the rest
And this is for you. What? Even if I failed?
You gave so much effort
For your son
Okay, this is just for my son only LOL Yep, let's put it that way
I'll send a picture of his ID card

I've been starving anyway
I took a bit from each plate and put them on the separate bowls, so it's clean
[This is mine now]
Yay! I got it even though I didn't make it
Since I could not beat the food challenge,
let me introduce my sub!
A cleanup hitter named Tzuyang!!!
I look forward to learning a lot from you!
Once again, Mr. Lee did not eat it straight from the plate.
Also, I love cold tteokbokki and sometimes make it to-go to eat it cold
I'm excited! Bon appetit!
This is the first time filming in my restaurant
(Where is he going?)
Can I borrow that real quick?
Sausage
[Laid back]

[Writing down something]
[Tips on how to do mukbang well] 1) Eat slowly with a smile 2) Show them the food before eating 3) No need to rush
Being ready to learn is a great mindset to have
You eat way faster than I do
That's just because I'm a beginner
I got stuffed quickly because I ate so fast
What's your favorite menu here personally?
Is it hard to pick one? You just like everything?
It literally changes every time I eat
Is that because there are 3 different types of tteokbokki?
You know, different cravings day to day
Jjampong tteokbokki is the most popular dish here
I love jjampong too
[He owns a Jjampong restaurant]
But the cost of its ingredients is expensive
Yeah I feel you. It needs lots of different ingredients

Put cheese on top
Did you dip the sandwich in the jjampong soup?
Yeah I do it sometimes
To make it sweet and sour?
Yeah and the cheese goes well with the soup
I feel like I came to a major company as a visitor to learn stuff
How come the foods have so much vegetables when the owner doesn't like them
Quick question, Sir. After I got the certificate from your restaurant,
[The day she received the cert (free food for life)]
Did Mrs. Lee (Miseon Park) say anything about it?
She told me I did a great job in a sarcastic manner
I suppose that the phrase conveys lots of meaning
Are you done with sundae (Stir-fried port intestine)?
Sundae, dead
It's yummy
I'm not trying to promote my own restaurant

I can't help it because the foods were originally made to suit my taste
I totally agree. The taste of tteokbokki is pretty rich and deep along with its soup
It really tastes rich and strong
I've learned a lot today. Huh?
I should not teach a fish how to swim
I can't hold a candle to the sun
I need to focus on my own path
[The reason why she's been quiet]
I can't really say that it's tasty because it's my own restaurant
I am a bit uneasy with it. I really can't say it out loud
I don't know what to say
It's alright
LOL
It's not too bad
Last one bite
Bibimbap has passed away

The sandwich tastes even better with some mascarpone cheese on top
Shrimp!
Here's some napkins
Thank you
It should be the other way around since I'm the owner lol
Please use a spoon to eat and drink the soup together. It tastes better.
Jjampong tteokbokki, dead
Here's all 3 of em
My camera director is asking me if you've really finished all 3 of them already
He didn't notice even though he was filming the entire time
Count Monte Cristo, dead
The red one is Count Dracula [Dad Joke..]
[Out of his mind]
Fisk cake soup, to heaven
We are watching the last moment of military stew's life
I'll do my best to stay by its deathbed

Til the last breath
All the dishes are dead
Here's all the other dishes as it may feel lonely on the way to heaven
We've watched all their deathbeds
Please stand up to receive your certificate!
Jeongwon Bunsik is presenting the lifetime free food pass for Tzuyang
Did you just say Jeongwon Bunsik? Yes I did
You can try whatever you want to eat at your own restaurant
Haha haha
Let's do sul-mukbang next time (Sul = alcohol). I'm so down
I would rather challenge that
I really want to give this to you so that your family can come and enjoy the food anytime
